final:
module RefModule(
    input      clk,
    input      rst,
    input      pulse,
    output reg toggle
);always @ (posedge clk or posedge rst)
        if (rst)
            toggle <= 0;
        else
            toggle <= toggle ^ pulse;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
